text:

From-To: open->feedback

It seems like you are only a person that get it. Can you try it again to see 
if you still get same result or not? If you don't get it anymore. You might 
want to test your RAM with memtest86+ or other RAM test tool. If you still get 
same result, please follow this: 

http://www.freebsd.org/gnome/docs/bugging.html
